findings.synopsis: The remote web server is affected by a remote code execution vulnerability in the Jakarta Multipart parser.
findings.solution: Upgrade Apache Struts to 2.3.32 / 2.5.10.1 or later.
findings.plugin_output: POST /upload.action with crafted Content-Type yielded `id` => uid=0(root)

findings.name: TLS 1.0 / 1.1 Protocols Enabled
findings.description: The server supports deprecated TLS 1.0 and 1.1 protocols which are vulnerable to known attacks (BEAST, POODLE).
findings.recommendation: Disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1; require TLS 1.2 or higher.

findings.title: Apache Struts 2 RCE
findings.description: Confirmed via a second tool against an additional host.
